name: Web - SQL Injection Attempt
description: Detects SQL injection attempts in Nginx and Apache access logs. Looks for classic SQLi patterns in URI, query strings and User-Agent fields including UNION SELECT, OR 1=1, comment sequences and blind SQLi payloads.
search: index=novruzbank (sourcetype=nginx_access OR sourcetype=apache_access) | eval uri_lower=lower(uri) | eval ua_lower=lower(useragent) | eval combined=uri_lower."|".(if(isnotnull(uri_query), lower(uri_query), ""))."|".(if(isnotnull(ua_lower), ua_lower, "")) | eval sqli_match=case( match(combined, "union.{0,20}select"), "UNION SELECT", match(combined, "select.{0,20}from"), "SELECT FROM", match(combined, "'\s*(or|and)\s*'?\d"), "OR/AND bypass", match(combined, "(--)|(#)|(%23)|(%2d%2d)"), "SQL Comment", match(combined, "sleep\s*\("), "Time-based blind", match(combined, "benchmark\s*\("), "Benchmark blind", match(combined, "(xp_cmdshell|exec\s*xp|exec\s*sp_)"), "MSSQL exec", match(combined, "information_schema|sysobjects|syscolumns"), "Schema enum", 1==0, null()) | where isnotnull(sqli_match) | stats count as hit_count, values(sqli_match) as attack_types, values(uri) as uris, values(status) as http_codes, dc(uri) as unique_uris by src_ip, host | eval severity="high" | eval mitre="T1190" | eval category="SQL Injection" | sort -hit_count | table src_ip, host, hit_count, unique_uris, attack_types, http_codes, uris, severity, mitre
author: SOC Team
